name: Pixelmator Pro
description: A versatile image editing application for Mac, combining photo editing, graphic design, and video editing with machine learning-powered tools.
longDescription: Pixelmator Pro is a comprehensive image editing application for Mac, developed by the Pixelmator Team in Lithuania. It combines powerful tools for photo editing, graphic design, and video editing within a single, user-friendly platform. Featuring machine learning-powered enhancements like ML Enhance and Super Resolution, layer-based editing, and support for vector graphics, Pixelmator Pro caters to both photographers and designers. Its extensive library of effects, templates, and native macOS integration ensures high performance and accessibility, making it a compelling choice for creative professionals seeking an affordable alternative to traditional editing software.
features: Machine learning-powered editing tools (ML Enhance, Super Resolution, etc.)
Extensive library of effects and adjustments
Template library for quick design starts
